description.ko: 음향 주파수를 역동적인 기하학적 패턴과 고동치는 빛의 파동으로 변환하여 소리의 물리적 발현을 탐구하는 몰입형 디지털 경험입니다.
description.en: An immersive digital experience that translates acoustic frequencies into dynamic geometric patterns and pulsing light waves, exploring the physical manifestation of sound.

prompt: A high-tech digital art installation titled ECHO-0, featuring complex 3D sound waves visualized as glowing neon architectural structures, iridescent fluid dynamics reacting to bass frequencies, dark void background, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, 8k resolution, cyberpunk aesthetic.
